message:
fix(graphql,registry): address DoS vector and error handling from code review

fcp-graphql:
- truncate_body: slice bytes before UTF-8 conversion to prevent OOM from
  arbitrarily large malicious responses (was allocating full response as
  String before truncating)

fcp-registry:
- Replace silent unwrap_or(0) timestamp fallback with expect() — system
  clock cannot produce negative timestamps before year 2262
- Use "<none>" instead of empty string for missing builder_id in
  UntrustedBuilder error to improve diagnostic clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
